title: Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup

seo.title: How to Make Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup — Easy Turkish Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make authentic Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup. This easy Turkish recipe includes step-by-step instructions, tips, and serving ideas.

easy Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup recipe
authentic Turkish Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup

h2Headings: What is Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup?

seo.imageAlt: Authentic Turkish Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup recipe
seo.imageCaption: Delicious homemade Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup — a beloved Turkish classic

description: Mercimek Corbasi is a beloved Turkish red lentil soup, known for its comforting warmth and vibrant flavor. This creamy, hearty soup is a staple in Turkish households, often enjoyed as a starter or a light meal. Its simplicity and nourishing qualities make it a perfect dish for any day.

instructions.title: Sauté Aromatics
instructions.text: In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened and translucent, about 5-7 minutes. Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant.

instructions.title: Add Tomato Paste and Spices
instructions.text: Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly, to deepen its flavor. Add the dried mint, red pepper flakes, cumin, salt, and black pepper. Cook for an additional minute, allowing the spices to become fragrant.

instructions.title: Combine Lentils and Broth
instructions.text: Add the rinsed and drained red lentils to the pot, stirring to coat them with the spice mixture. Pour in the chicken or vegetable broth (or water). Bring the mixture to a boil.

instructions.title: Simmer the Soup
instructions.text: Once boiling, reduce the heat to low, cover the pot, and let the soup simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are very tender and have broken down. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.

instructions.title: Blend to Smoothness
instructions.text: Carefully remove the pot from the heat. Using an immersion blender, blend the soup directly in the pot until it reaches a smooth and creamy consistency. Alternatively, transfer the soup in batches to a regular blender and blend until smooth, then return to the pot. Adjust seasoning if needed.

instructions.title: Prepare the Butter Topping
instructions.text: In a small pan, melt the butter over medium-low heat. Once melted, add a pinch of dried mint and a sprinkle of red pepper flakes. Cook for about 30 seconds until the mint becomes fragrant, being careful not to burn the butter.

instructions.title: Serve Mercimek Corbasi
instructions.text: Ladle the hot Mercimek Corbasi into serving bowls. Drizzle each serving with a spoonful of the melted spiced butter. Garnish with fresh mint leaves if desired and serve immediately with lemon wedges on the side for squeezing.

tips: Always rinse your red lentils thoroughly before cooking to remove any dust or debris and improve clarity of the soup.
For an extra depth of flavor, use a good quality chicken or beef broth instead of just water. Vegetable broth works perfectly for a vegetarian version.
When blending, ensure the soup is smooth but not overly aerated. The goal is a creamy texture. Adjust consistency with a little extra hot water or broth if it's too thick after blending.
article: Mercimek Corbasi Red Lentil Soup is a beloved Turkish Soups and Stews dish enjoyed across Turkey. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
